hero.title: Design services powered by AI, perfected by human creativity.
hero.description: Whether you need instant AI-generated visuals or fully custom designs, Gurucraftpro delivers quality, clarity, and creativity for every stage of your business.

tiers.name: AI Design
tiers.description: Ideal for early-stage startups and budget-conscious users who need fast ideas. Get instant visual concepts to kickstart your branding.

tiers.name: AI + Manual Refinement
tiers.description: For businesses that want the speed of AI but the quality assurance of a human designer. We take the best AI concepts and refine them to professional standards.

tiers.name: Fully Custom Design
tiers.description: For established brands and high-impact needs. Complete creative direction, from discovery to final delivery, tailored exactly to your vision.

faq.q: What is the main difference between AI and Custom design?
faq.a: AI design is instant and generated by algorithms based on your text prompts. It's great for quick inspiration. Custom design involves a professional human designer (Gurucraftpro) working strategically on your brand to ensure uniqueness and market fit.

faq.q: Can I upgrade from AI to Custom later?
faq.a: Absolutely! Many clients start with AI to generate ideas and then request a 'Hybrid' or 'Custom' service to refine those ideas into professional assets. We offer an upgrade path for this exact scenario.

AI-generated images can be tricky with copyright depending on jurisdiction. However, our Custom and Hybrid services include full commercial rights and original vector files, ensuring you own your brand identity.

faq.q: What file formats do I get?
faq.a: AI plans typically provide high-res PNG/JPG. Custom and Hybrid plans provide editable source files (AI, EPS, SVG) along with web-ready standards.

process.title: Designed for impact, focused on you.
process.description: Simple steps to transform your vision into reality.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We start by understanding your brand, audience, and goals.

steps.title: Generation
steps.desc: Using AI and human intuition, we create base concepts.

steps.title: Refinement
steps.desc: We polish the chosen concept to professional standards.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: You receive final files and a usage guide.
